hero.subtitle: Ábaco Developments helps companies connect technology, analytics and commercial processes to improve customer relationships and make better decisions.

transition.title: We turn data, processes and technology into smarter commercial systems.
transition.lead: Every customer interaction is a signal. We connect those signals with your processes and technology so they work as a single system.

crm.title: CRM & Loyalty
crm.description: A single view of every customer to build relationships that last.

data.title: Data & BI
data.description: Connected, visual information to decide with confidence and speed.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Processes that run themselves so your team can focus on growth.

system.title: We design systems that connect customer, data and automation.
system.lead: A connected information core for every channel: CRM, data, BI, AI and automation working on the same foundation.

services.title: Core services
services.lead: Capabilities that combine according to your business needs, from diagnosis to day-to-day operation.

crm.title: CRM & Loyalty
crm.description: Strategy and tools to know, segment and build loyalty with your customers.

data.title: Data Analytics / BI
data.description: Clear dashboards and connected data for faster decisions.

automation.title: Commercial automation
automation.description: Workflows that remove repetitive tasks and speed up your sales operation.

ai.title: AI applied to business
ai.description: Models and assistants that power real processes, without unnecessary complexity.

transformation.title: Digital transformation
transformation.description: End-to-end support to modernise processes, data and tools.

consulting.title: Technology consulting
consulting.description: Diagnosis and technology roadmap tailored to your business.

methodology.title: How we work
methodology.description: A collaborative process to design custom systems that connect data, processes and people according to each client's reality.

diagnosis.title: Diagnosis
diagnosis.front: We understand your business, your processes and your friction points.
diagnosis.back: We map needs, current tools, available data, internal processes and improvement opportunities before designing any solution.

strategy.title: Strategy & Design
strategy.front: We define a tailored architecture, not a generic template.
strategy.back: We design the ideal system for each client: CRM, data, automation, integrations, roles, flows and priorities.

implementation.title: Implementation
implementation.front: We build the system on a solid, scalable technical foundation.
implementation.back: We develop, connect tools, validate flows and prepare a solution ready to operate in the client's day-to-day.

adoption.title: Adoption
adoption.front: We support the team so the system is actually used.
adoption.back: We train the team, adjust the solution with real feedback and provide operational documentation to ease the transition.

improvement.title: Continuous improvement
improvement.front: We measure, optimise and evolve the system with the business.
improvement.back: We review data, results and new processes to adapt the solution to each client stage and keep improving performance.

partners.title: Partners & Clients
partners.lead: Our own projects and collaborations with consultancies and brands across different sectors.
